narrative: Trump war threats over a downed helicopter drive Middle East escalation as USD/JPY tests the 160.35 intervention shelf; gold lower -1.84%; equities -0.26%; DXY +0.05%; VIX 19.9. USD leads G10 (+0.71% avg) on risk-premium demand and a +300bp OIS carry vs JPY, while AUD/USD hits six-week lows on risk-off sentiment. Watch BoC Rate Decision at 14:00 UTC and US CPI tomorrow.
